structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches for forcing zone airflow setpoints, damper, heating, fan, and resetting request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Override capabilities: force airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin; damper full closed/open; heating OFF/closed; fan ON/OFF; reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Test leaking dampers by forcing all VAV boxes in a Zone Group closed and recording airflow at the AHU.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
a. force  zone airflow setpoint  to zero ,
b. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vcool -max,
c. force  zone airflow  setpoint  to Vmin ,
d. force  damper full closed/open ,
e. force  heating to OFF/closed ,
f. turn fan ON/OFF, and
g. reset  request -hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section ).

evidence_quote: 5.10.7.  Testing/Commissioning Overrides . Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
